title: TL11D Tuition Fees Certificate - Educational Institutions Outside Canada for a Deemed Resident of Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## TL11D Tuition Fees Certificate - Educational Institutions Outside Canada for a Deemed Resident of Canada
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Post-secondary educational institutions outside of Canada use this form to certify a student's tuition fees if the student is a deemed resident of Canada.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (tl11d-fill-25e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (tl11d-fill-25e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (tl11d-25e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (tl11d-25e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
- TL11A Tuition and Enrolment Certificate - University Outside Canada
- TL11C Tuition and Enrolment Certificate - Commuter to the United States
- P105 Students and Income Tax

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
